input: Imagine a self-contained, hypothetical world with only the following conditions, and without any unmentioned factors or causal relationships: Yupt has a direct effect on zupj. Zupj has a direct effect on muvq. For those who are not yupt, the probability of muvq is 25%. For those who are yupt, the probability of muvq is 25%. For those who are yupt, would it be more likely to see muvq if the individual was not yupt?
